value.rationale: The fetched page is exclusively about the Antigravity 2.0 agent permissions system — covering permission resources, access lists (Deny/Ask/Allow), supported actions (read_file, write_file, read_url, execute_url, command, unsandboxed, mcp), terminal sandboxing, and configuration examples. There is no mention whatsoever of an Evals/testing harness feature, running evaluations, or test suites against agent behavior. The claim is not substantiated by this page.
